resources.string: Enter a link or choose a file to start watching
No internet connection. Check your network settings and try again.
Server not found. Check the playlist URL and try again.
Connection timed out. The server took too long to respond.
Playlist not found. The URL may be incorrect or the playlist was removed.
Access denied. The server rejected the request.
Server returned error %d. Try again later.
Invalid URL. Enter a valid playlist link starting with http:// or https://
Invalid playlist format. The file is not a valid M3U playlist.
Failed to save playlist. Please try again.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
